query: German Eierpfannkuchen thin egg pancake omelette for a simple savory meal

draft.title: Eierpfannkuchen
draft.description: German Eierpfannkuchen are thin egg pancakes perfect for a simple savory meal, easy to prepare and serve with various toppings.

steps.text: In a large bowl, whisk the eggs with milk and salt until combined.
Gradually sift in the flour while whisking to form a smooth, thin batter without lumps.
Heat a non-stick frying pan over medium heat and melt a small amount of butter to coat the surface.
Pour a ladle of batter into the pan, swirling to cover the base evenly and thinly.
Cook for about 1-2 minutes until the edges lift and the bottom is golden, then flip carefully and cook the other side for 1 minute.
Repeat with remaining batter, adding butter as needed. Season with black pepper before serving.
